title: Freshly Textured
description: A Texture pack to enhance your vanilla experience. Couple it with some animation add-ons and it will look fabulous!
body:
**This is a singleplayer-focused texture pack that refreshes Minecraft’s blocks and items while keeping them instantly recognizable. Inspired by the clean style of Actions & Stuff, the textures look fresher, smoother, and more consistent—without drifting away from the classic vanilla identity. Inspired by actions and stuff. For those who want an Action-and-Stuff-in-java textures feel, this should be a good alternative. Enjoy!
**This goes far ahead from being inspired by Actions and Stuff by things such as even revamped textures and colorful GUI's**

Nothing gameplay-related is touched. No mechanics, no changes that affect how the game works. It’s purely a visual upgrade designed to make the world feel cleaner and more modern while still looking like Minecraft.

The links for the packs and mods used for this is listed below on the dependencies folders. So please do not frame me for violating ARR license. Mod or pack authors that has created the mods are respected. But I am still mentioning them.
https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mobs-stuff and https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-gui


**What To expect**

- Refreshed block, animations, item textures

- Vanilla look preserved — everything stays easy to identify

- Built for singleplayer immersion

- Lightweight and smooth

- Perfect base for animation packs

Simple, clean, and flexible—this pack is made for players who want vanilla Minecraft to look fresh today and stunning when combined with animations. ✨
